parameters.query: INSERT INTO wazuh_snapshots (total_alerts, critical_alerts, high_alerts, medium_alerts, agent_count, agents_active, top_rule_id, top_rule_desc, raw_json) VALUES ({{ $json.total_alerts }}, {{ $json.critical_alerts }}, {{ $json.high_alerts }}, {{ $json.medium_alerts }}, {{ $json.agent_count }}, {{ $json.agents_active }}, '{{ $json.top_rule_id }}', '{{ $json.top_rule_desc }}', '{{ $json.raw_json }}')

=INSERT INTO wazuh_agents (agent_id, agent_name, platform, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.agent_id }}', '{{ $json.agent_name }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.status }}') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE agent_name='{{ $json.agent_name }}', platform='{{ $json.platform }}', status='{{ $json.status }}', last_seen=NOW()

=INSERT INTO wazuh_fim_snapshots (agent_id, agent_name, total_fim_events, recent_fim_events) VALUES ('{{ $json.agent_id }}', '{{ $json.agent_name }}', {{ $json.total_fim_events || 0 }}, {{ $json.recent_fim_events || 0 }})

=INSERT INTO wazuh_fim_events (agent_id, file_path, event_type, change_count, file_type, md5, sha1, sha256, size, fim_date) VALUES ('{{ $json.agent_id }}', {{ JSON.stringify($json.file_path) }}, '{{ $json.event_type || "file" }}', {{ $json.change_count || 0 }}, '{{ $json.file_type || "file" }}', '{{ $json.md5 || "" }}', '{{ $json.sha1 || "" }}', '{{ $json.sha256 || "" }}', {{ $json.size || 0 }}, '{{ $json.fim_date || "" }}')

=INSERT INTO wazuh_hourly_trends (hour, total_alerts, high_plus_alerts, syscheck_events, firewall_events, total_events) VALUES ({{ $json.hour }}, {{ $json.total_alerts }}, {{ $json.high_plus_alerts }}, {{ $json.syscheck_events }}, {{ $json.firewall_events }}, {{ $json.total_events }})

=INSERT INTO wazuh_rule_stats (hour, rule_id, rule_desc, rule_level, rule_groups, hit_count) VALUES ({{ $json.hour }}, {{ $json.rule_id }}, '{{ $json.rule_desc }}', {{ $json.rule_level }}, '{{ $json.rule_groups }}', {{ $json.hit_count }})

=INSERT INTO wazuh_critical_fim (agent_id, agent_name, file_path, change_count, md5, sha256, size, fim_date) VALUES ('{{ $json.agent_id }}', '{{ $json.agent_name }}', '{{ $json.file_path }}', {{ $json.change_count || 0 }}, '{{ $json.md5 }}', '{{ $json.sha256 }}', {{ $json.size || 0 }}, '{{ $json.fim_date }}')

DELETE FROM wazuh_fim_events WHERE captured_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY); DELETE FROM wazuh_critical_fim WHERE captured_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY); DELETE FROM wazuh_fim_snapshots WHERE captured_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY); DELETE FROM wazuh_hourly_trends WHERE captured_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY); DELETE FROM wazuh_rule_stats WHERE captured_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY); DELETE FROM wazuh_snapshots WHERE captured_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY);
